title: What does Ritsuko have against Rei
display_title: What does Ritsuko have against Rei
wikitext:
[]: What does Ritsuko have against Rei?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Tue Jul 25, 2006 11:01 am I was flipping thorugh the manga, and I saw a part where Ristsuko pulls the strings on Rei's school uniform, thus choking her temporarily. Also, she killed the Rei clones and said she did because she hated Rei. Also, Ritsuko's mum also strangled the young Rei. And Unit-00 hit the glass where Ritsuko was.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Jul 25, 2006 11:14 am Maybe Ritsuko sort of blames Rei for her mother's death?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Jul 25, 2006 11:46 am The EVAs hate her, because she tormented them by giving them birth and maintaining their existence(=hell). Ritsuko hates Ayanami because she was "competition" in her eyes. And as we could see, poor Ritsuko lost this competition, or at least she thought so, since Gendo preferred Ayanami, not her.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Jul 25, 2006 11:59 am It pretty much comes down to the knowledge that Rei is a clone, or at least simulacrum, of Yui. Ritsuko knew that she was only being used by Gendo and that she would never be loved by him the same way he had loved Yui no matter what might have gone on physically between them behind the scenes. Rei's presence would never allow that memory to die, and as her creator, Ritsuko knew that Rei could eventually reunite Gendo with Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 25, 2006 12:05 pm [quote="FauÃŸtin"]The EVAs hate her, because she tormented them by giving them birth and maintaining their existence(=hell)./quote] Evas 00~02 already existed when Ritsuko came on board. EVA-00 attacks Ritsuko apparently because Naoko is not available.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Jul 25, 2006 12:51 pm Reichu wrote: FauÃŸtin wrote: The EVAs hate her, because she tormented them by giving them birth and maintaining their existence(=hell).

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Tue Jul 25, 2006 1:12 pm at the root of it all is gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Jul 25, 2006 1:45 pm darth_mark wrote: at the root of it all is gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 25, 2006 2:04 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: O_O I didn't know that. I thought that Ritsuko came before Unit-00 was made.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Jul 25, 2006 2:24 pm Gendo gets too much credit. He was making half of it up as he went along.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 25, 2006 9:37 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: darth_mark wrote: at the root of it all is gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Tue Jul 25, 2006 9:46 pm After all Gendo had been too lustful and greedy. And his incapability to make good relationships caused all these chaos.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 25, 2006 9:48 pm tinmeigut wrote: After all Gendo had been too lustful and greedy. And his incapability to make good relationships caused all these chaos.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 25, 2006 9:54 pm He seemed to have something mighty fine going with Yui. "Lustful"? I dunno how you come to that conclusion. The Akagi women went to HIM (and you can see how forceful Naoko was), and there's no evidence that he's been up to anything else. And... not the Gendo-bashing again. YGK 4evar!

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 25, 2006 10:40 pm Reichu wrote: . YGK 4evar!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 25, 2006 11:46 pm YGK is the sacred alliance of Yui-Gendo-Kozo against the evil forces of Seele.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 25, 2006 11:48 pm Reichu wrote: YGK is the sacred alliance of Yui-Gendo-Kozo against the evil forces of Seele.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Jul 27, 2006 8:57 pm Gendo is the man. You just love to hate him. Without Gendo the show would be boring.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 9:07 pm No I just dont like Gendo. Yes he is a major player and eva wouldnt be possible w/o him. i just dont like him.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Jul 29, 2006 12:25 am I KNOW....I SHALL EXPLAIN!!! Gendou was using Ritsuko's mother to build the magi and Evas for him after Yui died.....(RITSUKO's MOTHER IS THE ONE WHO TRAPPED YUI IN UNIT 01....BECAUSE OF JEALOUSY) He was pretending to love her.... Thats why when she saw Rei...who revealed what Gendo really thought of her...(old hag).....so she freaked out and killed Rei...Rei reminded her of Yui (which makes sense)...her jelousy took over...then she realised she killed a little girl....and threw herself off the balcony....her soul is trapped in UNIT 00.......(Rei can still pilot it though, since she is half angel)...[ this is why when UNIT 00 goes berserk it tries to attack Gendo...and tries to kill Rei]....... NOW GENDOU IS DOING THE SAME THING TO RITSUKO TO KEEP HER WORKING FOR HIM...except Ritsuko knows about Rei being helf Yui...theres the jelousy that Gendo puts more worth upon all these little Reis than her...thats why she hates Rei
